tasks.description: Create .env.example files for all workspaces (root, api, web, database) documenting required environment variables including AUTH_USERNAME and AUTH_PASSWORD
tasks.verify: .env.example files exist at root, apps/api, apps/web, packages/database with all required vars documented

tasks.description: Update API CORS configuration to read from CORS_ORIGIN env var (permissive fallback in development)
tasks.verify: CORS reads from CORS_ORIGIN env var; defaults to permissive when unset; existing tests still pass

tasks.description: Update storage config to add Cloudinary configuration and STORAGE_PROVIDER env var selection
tasks.verify: storageConfig includes cloudinaryConfig; STORAGE_PROVIDER env var parsed; isProduction/isDevelopment helpers updated

tasks.description: TDD RED: Write CloudinaryStorageService unit tests (mock cloudinary SDK) covering upload, delete, getImageUrl, imageExists, and error handling
tasks.verify: Test file exists with ~10 test cases; all tests FAIL (no implementation yet)

tasks.description: TDD GREEN: Implement CloudinaryStorageService (implements IStorageService) using cloudinary SDK upload_stream, destroy, and URL generation
tasks.verify: All CloudinaryStorageService tests pass; npm run test:api passes

tasks.description: Update storage factory (services/storage/index.ts) to return CloudinaryStorageService when STORAGE_PROVIDER=cloudinary
tasks.verify: Factory returns correct service based on STORAGE_PROVIDER; existing tests pass with STORAGE_PROVIDER=local or unset

tasks.description: Update image retrieval endpoint (GET /api/wines/:id/image) to redirect for Cloudinary URLs (wine.imageUrl starting with http)
tasks.verify: Cloud URLs redirect (302); local filenames serve file (existing behavior); integration tests pass

tasks.description: Update next.config.js to read API URL from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL env var (default localhost:3001 for dev)
tasks.verify: next.config.js reads NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL; defaults to http://localhost:3001; no hardcoded localhost in production

tasks.description: Create railway.json with build command (npm ci + db:generate + build), start command, and health check path
tasks.verify: railway.json exists at repo root with correct build/start commands and /api/health healthcheck

tasks.description: TDD: Write tests then implement Basic Auth middleware for Express API — require HTTP Basic Auth on all routes except GET /api/health when AUTH_USERNAME and AUTH_PASSWORD env vars are set; skip auth when unset
tasks.verify: Middleware blocks unauthenticated requests (401) when env vars set; passes through when unset; /api/health always accessible; tests pass

tasks.description: Implement Next.js middleware for Basic Auth on all pages — require HTTP Basic Auth when AUTH_USERNAME and AUTH_PASSWORD env vars are set; skip when unset
tasks.verify: Next.js middleware returns 401 with WWW-Authenticate header when credentials missing/wrong; passes through when env vars unset; local dev unaffected

tasks.description: Write integration tests for image endpoint redirect behavior (cloud URLs vs local filenames) and storage factory switching
tasks.verify: Integration tests cover: redirect for http URLs, serve file for local filenames, factory returns correct provider

tasks.description: Run full test suite (npm test) to verify no regressions across all 729+ existing tests
tasks.verify: All tests pass including new Cloudinary, auth, and integration tests; zero regressions

tasks.description: Documentation reconciliation - identify and update affected docs
All verification gates passed - spec complete
